# Encoding Edge Cases

## Emoji Content

Here's some emoji: 🚀 🎉 💡 ✅

## Unicode Characters

Café, résumé, naïve, über.

Combined characters: é (precomposed) vs e + combining accent.

## Code Blocks

```javascript
const greeting = "Hello, World!";
console.log(greeting);
```

## Special Characters

Arrows: → ← ↑ ↓
Math: ∑ ∏ ∫ ∂
Quotes: "smart double" 'smart single' «guillemets»
